info.summary:
Create, install and manage Minecraft instances.
This module is an unofficial 3rd party Minecraft launcher with inbuilt modloader, Modrinth and CurseForge support!
info.name: Minecraft

changelogs:
2024.8-beta.1

This preview versions adds the instance search to discover.


Additions:
+ Discover search
+ Instance view launch button
+ Details for Discover search

2024.7-beta.3

This preview version adds the module to the official module page.


Additions:
+ Back to select button (Login screen)


Bugfixes:
• Fix login screen loop
